info.name: ONHS UC0 — Bulk Procurement: NGO Cough Analysis
info.description:
### Quick-start: environment setup

1. Import **ONHS_Dev_Environment.json** into Postman (Environments → Import).
2. Select the **ONHS Dev** environment from the environment picker.
3. Set `bpp_adapter_url` and `bap_adapter_url` to your sandbox endpoints before running.
4. All UUID-format variable defaults are pre-filled — they are unique per session;
   regenerate UUIDs for separate test runs if needed.
5. `networkId` is currently `onhs.in/health` — confirm with the ONHS registry team
   before running against the production network.

## ONHS UC0 — Bulk Procurement

**Scenario:** Swastha Karnataka Foundation (NGO) pre-purchases 1,000 AI cough analysis units from Swaasa Health Platform at the NGO discount rate.

**Protocol:** Beckn v2.0.0 (core spec) + Health* schema pack v2.1
**healthServiceType:** DIAGNOSTIC_ANALYTICS | **Quantity:** 1,000 units

### Discount model

The catalog carries two offers for the same resource:

| Offer ID | Rate | Eligibility |
|---|---|---|
| offer-swaasa-bulk-standard | ₹250/unit | All registered agencies |
| **offer-swaasa-bulk-ngo** | **₹200/unit** | NGOs with valid district MOU |

discountRef `NGO-DISCOUNT-20PCT-2026` is **pre-published in the catalog offer**.
totalAmount = netAmount = ₹2,00,000 (discount is baked into the NGO offer price).

### Eligibility verification

The BAP asserts NGO identity in `participants[]` at `select` via two fields:
- `healthIds: [{system: "NGO_DARPAN", value: "NGO-KA-2019-00142"}]` — the registration ID
- `credentialRefs` — a Document-branch `Credential/v2.0` entry pointing to the NGO-Darpan
  certificate (URL + SHA-256 checksum), enabling runtime verification

### Consideration lifecycle

| Call | status.code | pricePerUnit | totalAmount | netAmount |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| catalog (on_discover) | *(none)* | 200 | — | — |
| on_select | *(none)* | 200 | 200,000 | 200,000 |
| on_init | QUOTED | 200 | 200,000 | 200,000 |
| confirm | ACTIVE | 200 | 200,000 | 200,000 |
| on_confirm / on_status | ACTIVE | 200 | 200,000 | 200,000 |

### Key output
HealthEntitlement `{{entitlement_id}}`:
- lockedTermsSnapshot.offerId = offer-swaasa-bulk-ngo
- lockedTermsSnapshot.pricePerUnit = 200 | discountRef = NGO-DISCOUNT-20PCT-2026
- totalCapacity: 1,000 | state: ACTIVE | validUntil: 2027-04-30
- entitlementId feeds UC1 single-patient drawdown and UC2 camp collections.

request.description:
POST to CDS. Expect HTTP 200 ACK on acceptance.
HTTP 409 AckNoCallback = CDS accepted but will not send on_publish callback.
HTTP 400/401/500 = rejected — check error object in response body.
action enum: 'catalog/publish' (slash form). CDS also accepts 'catalog_publish' (underscore).

variable.description: CDS (Catalog Discovery Service) base URL — confirm with ONHS network team
ONHS network identifier. Confirm exact value with ONHS registry team before going live.
Issued at on_confirm. Used as entitlementRef in UC1 + UC2 collections.
NGO-rate offer (₹200/unit). Selected by BAP in this scenario.
Standard-rate offer (₹250/unit). Present in catalog; not selected here.
SHA-256 checksum of the NGO-Darpan registration certificate submitted in credentialRefs at select.
